---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an addition to RAK OS
title: "feat: "
labels: feature
---

**The problem**
What's missing, and who feels it.

**Proposal**
What you'd add. For a new tool/skill, sketch the `rak_<module>_<op>` shape and tier.

**Substantive change?**
Anything touching the spec, protocol surface, economics, or governance needs an RFC
([`docs/rfcs/0000-template.md`](../../docs/rfcs/0000-template.md)) and Crown ratification. Open the discussion here first.
